title: Resize Kanban Board to full width of the screen
excerpt:
Please always resize all columns in the kanban board so that they always fill up the full width of the screen. 
Outcome would be that Items with longer names can be read more easily.

posts.author: Poffke (Michael Röpke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please always resize all columns in the kanban board so that they always fill up the full width of the screen.
Outcome would be that Items with longer names can be read more easily.
